component.name: OpenStickies
component.summary: Beautiful sticky notes for your desktop

description.p: OpenStickies is a modern sticky notes application that helps you organize your thoughts, tasks, and reminders. Create beautiful notes with rich text formatting, customizable colors, and seamless desktop integration.

ul.li: Create and organize sticky notes on your desktop
Rich text formatting (bold, italic, strikethrough, titles)
Customizable colors and background images
Reminder system with desktop notifications
Dark and light theme support
Drag and drop file shortcuts
Checkbox/todo lists with strikethrough
Code block auto-detection with syntax styling
Customizable keyboard shortcuts (global and in-app)
Export to TXT, Markdown, JSON
KDE Activities integration

description.p: The free version includes up to 5 notes, 1 active reminder, and 1 GIF background. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited features at openstickies.com.

screenshot.caption: OpenStickies main view with multiple notes

ul.li: Inline image display with resize options (Full, Medium, Small)
CJK input method support (fcitx5 and ibus)
Note collapse/expand to header-only view
Editable note titles via double-click
Nested todo checklists with Tab/Shift+Tab indentation
Redesigned About dialog with community links
Snap Store support
Performance optimization for large note collections

description.p: Major release with new features and improvements:

ul.li: Customizable keyboard shortcuts (global and in-app)
Code blocks with auto-detection and theme-aware styling
Redesigned hub interface with modern SVG icons
Improved link management with remove link option
Redesigned search dialog with hover previews and sortable columns
Complete translation coverage for all 11 languages
35% smaller AppImage (75 MB)
GNOME desktop support without taskbar extension
Code block auto-detection for pasted code
HTML link preservation from web copy
Docker-based AppImage build for cross-distro compatibility
Bug fixes and performance improvements
